optionA.text: Body short and grublike, with few segments, unpaired dorsal cirri and branchiae absent

optionB.text: Body long and slender, with at least 15 segments; unpaired dorsal cirri on one or two anterior segments or larval branchiae present

optionA.text: Unpaired dorsal cirri present; branchiae absent

optionB.text: Unpaired dorsal cirri absent; branchiae present
